Congaree River & the Gervais Street Bridge
Rooted in South Carolina

We don't study this market. We live in it.

From Columbia to Charleston, Orangeburg to Sumter, we know South Carolina's neighborhoods block by block, where the markets are flourishing and where real value is still overlooked.

That local fluency, paired with decades of hands-on commercial and residential work, is what lets us move on the right opportunities and tell our partners the truth about each one.

About Us

Two operators. Fifty-plus years of Carolina real estate.

Jimmy Skipper and Mary Anne Eubank bring more than 50 years of combined experience across both commercial and residential real estate, from commercial ownership and leasing to residential redevelopment, distressed and foreclosure acquisitions, and property management.

That dual perspective is why our partners get a team that has genuinely operated through full market cycles, with the local relationships to back it up.

Work With Us →

Jimmy Skipper

Investor · Operator

Leads acquisitions and operations, drawing on a background in commercial ownership and the business side of real estate.

Mary Anne Eubank

Licensed SC Agent

Brings residential and brokerage expertise and guides clients through buying, selling, and leasing across South Carolina.
